# library()

**Type Method**

Creates a new library destination for the media item.

## Declaration

```swift
class func library() -> Self
```

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INMediaDestinationReference] object or `nil` if unable to create.

## Discussion

A library is a generic concept that you must define for your app. For example, in Apple Music, it’s the Apple Music library, while in Podcasts, it’s the user’s subscribed podcasts.

## Creating a Media Destination Object

- **playlistDestination(withName:)**: Creates a new playlist destination for the media item.

items.description: Creates a new playlist destination for the media item.
items.name: playlistDestination(withName:)
